description_long: This house features a modern, symmetrical facade with a dark gable roof and two prominent upper-level covered balconies. The front includes large glass sliding doors and windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary look. A central entryway is flanked by two sets of wide steps leading to a wooden deck and an adjacent raised platform, likely for outdoor seating or a pool. The side elevations are simple, with vertical window strips and minimal ornamentation. The rear of the house is more understated, with large windows and a secondary door, maintaining the modern aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, large glass windows, and dual upper balconies, featuring a spacious wooden deck and clean, symmetrical lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, two upper balconies, large glass doors, and a wooden deck with an adjacent platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, vertical window strips, and the extension of the deck area.
description_view_2: Rear view with large windows and a secondary door, lacking balconies or deck features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, with vertical window strips and visible balcony overhangs.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large glass panels and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Central glass door with wide steps, wooden deck, and overhanging balconies above
